title: All The Fabric 4
description: All The Fabric v4 prioritises performance using Fabric Loader API and integrates select mods from All The Forge v9, making it a versatile choice for Minecraft players who likes a mix of mods.
body:
## ⚠︎⚠︎ We’ve relocated! You can download the latest version of All The Fabric [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/atfb) ⚠︎⚠︎

![All The Fabric 4](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ATF4/BH_NU_HEADER.webp)

![Minecraft Java Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Java%20Edition-1.19.3-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=block)
![Minimum RAM](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minimum%20RAM-3GB-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=)
[![FORGE Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/FORGE-EDITION-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=)](https://atlauncher.com/pack/AllTheForge9)

**NO OPTIFINE NEEDED: Access Shaders in Video Settings > Shader Packs > Add Your Shader**

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ATF4/BH_NU_ABOUT.webp)

All The Fabric 4 is an impressive modpack that prioritizes performance gameplay, utilizing the Fabric Loader API from the ground up. It's also integrated with select mods from All The Forge 9, making it a versatile choice for Minecraft players. This pack showcases the best of what Fabric has to offer and is continually updated with new mods. It includes popular mods like Bewitchment, Applied Energistics 2, and many more, providing players with a wealth of options to enhance their gaming experience. With its focus on performance and quality, All The Fabric 4 is a top choice for those seeking a stable and immersive Minecraft experience.

Our modpack offers a diverse selection of different style mods, so you're sure to find something that suits your preferences. Whether you're after a mix of gameplay styles or looking for a more lightweight version of our Forge modpack, you've come to the right place. Built with performance in mind, our modpack is designed to run smoothly on lower-end PCs with at least 3GB of RAM. However, we advise against running the modpack on machines with less than 3GB of RAM, as it has not been tested and may result in performance issues.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ATF4/BH_NU_FEATURES.webp)

✔️ [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld - WWOO](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld)

✔️ [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) and [Traverse](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse)

✔️ [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes)

✔️ [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)

✔️ [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) and [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)

✔️ [CC: Restitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-restitched)

✔️ [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants)

✔️ [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric)

✔️ Lots of Building Blocks

✔️ Lots of more Food.

✔️ Built in Shader support thanks to [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) [You need to add your own Shader]

✔️ No Chat Reporting (Restores the chat back to Pre 1.19)

✔️ Quality of Life improvements such as Backpacks, [Macaw’s Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges), Waystones, Recipes fixes/upgrades, Optimizations and much more.

✔️ 100+ Mods


The complete list of mods can be found under the "Mods" tab, which can be accessed via this link: [technicpack.net](https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/all-the-fabric-4.1932437/mods).

## SUPPORT ##
If you need help or support with this modpack, please join our Discord server by clicking the banner below.
[![Discord Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ATF4/BH_NU_DISCORD.webp)](https://discord.gg/enrpMDd)

## SETUP & INSTALLATION: ##

**FABRIC:** While the latest version of Fabric for 1.19.3 should be compatible, it's possible that it may cause an older mod in the modpack to break. In such a case, the version of Fabric currently included in the modpack is 0.14.21

<details>
<summary>Read me before using OPTIFINE</summary>

By default, OptiFine is not compatible with All The Fabric 4 because it contains some pre-installed optimization mods. Therefore, you must remove the listed mods below in order to load the pack with OptiFine.

+ [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
+ [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
+ [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
+ [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
+ [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves)
+ [Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem)
+ [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
+ [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

Please remember that in addition to OptiFine, you must also have a mod called OptiFabric installed, otherwise the pack will crash. You can download OptiFabric from this link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric
</details>

## OPTIONAL RECOMMENDATIONS: ##

If your system can handle it, I suggest trying out some shaders with this modpack and Minecraft to enhance your experience. Shaders can bring out the best in both the modpack and the game.
